meta.title: Devya X-Ray — Engineering Review
meta.description: Devya X-Ray audits your codebase, infrastructure, and delivery practices, then hands you a prioritized, evidence-backed engineering report.

landing.tagline: They interview you. We read your code.
landing.pitch: Devya X-Ray is a deep engineering review: we audit your codebase, infrastructure, and delivery practices against a proven maturity framework, verify every claim in a working session with your team, and hand you a prioritized, evidence-backed report you can act on immediately.

assessment.errorBody: This link may have expired or the token is invalid. Please contact your Devya consultant for a fresh link.
assessment.welcomeIntro: This self-assessment is the first step of your {framework} review. For each engineering practice, pick the maturity level that honestly matches where you are today and, when you can, point us to evidence.
assessment.expectHonesty: Each maturity level shows a short rubric — use it to answer honestly; there are no wrong answers.
assessment.expectVerify: We verify the answers together in the workshop, so estimates are fine.
assessment.resumeNote: Your progress is saved automatically — you can close this page and come back anytime with the same link.
assessment.resumeProgress: You've already answered {answered} of {total} — pick up where you left off.
assessment.saveError: Couldn't save — we'll retry with your next change
assessment.evidencePlaceholder: Paste a link, name a file or tool, or leave a one-line note on where this lives…
assessment.allAnswered: Every practice is answered — great work.
assessment.submitNote: You won't be able to edit your answers after submitting.
assessment.submitEmpty: Answer at least one practice before submitting.
assessment.confirmBody: After submitting you can no longer edit your answers. We'll verify them together in the workshop.
assessment.submittedBody: Your self-assessment has been submitted. We'll verify the answers together in your workshop and follow up with the full report.

report.errorBody: This link may have expired or the token is invalid. Please contact your Devya consultant.
